---
title: "Sondages par l'exemple"
author: Bastien PERRIN-ZEN & François SEMECURBE
date: "2026.06.25"
format: 
  revealjs: 
    self-contained: true
---

## <span style="font-size:36px;">Introduction à l'atelier</span>



## <span style="font-size:36px;">Simulation de tirages aléatoires</span>

<div style="display:flex; gap:40px; align-items:flex-start; font-family:sans-serif;">
  <div>

  <!-- Colonne gauche : sliders -->
<span style="font-size:18px;font-weight:bold">Paramètres :</span><br>
<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Taille de la grille :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof gridSize = (() => {
  const slider = Inputs.range([5, 100], {value: 20, step: 1})
  slider.style.width = "250px"
  slider.style.fontSize = "20px"
  return slider
})()
```

<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Nombre de points :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof numPoints = (() => {
  const slider = Inputs.range([10, 5000], {value: 500, step: 10})
  slider.style.width = "250px"
  slider.style.fontSize = "20px"
  return slider
})()
```

<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Nombre de cases sélectionnées :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof k = (() => {
  const slider = Inputs.range([1, gridSize * gridSize], {value: 60, step: 1})
  slider.style.width = "250px"
  slider.style.fontSize = "20px"
  return slider
})()
```

--------------------------

<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Choix de la répartition des points :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof choix_repartition_points = Inputs.select(
  [
    "Uniforme",
    "Ondulations croisées régulières",
    "Ondulations croisées irrégulières",
    "Ondulations sinusoïdales",
    "Concentration centrale",
    "Motif en cercles concentriques ou anneaux"
  ],
  { value: "Uniforme"}
)
```

<style>
  select, select option {
    font-size: 20px !important;   /* taille des options */
  }
</style>
  </div>

  <!-- Colonne droite : grille -->
  <div id="grid-container">
```{ojs}
{
  const totalCells = gridSize * gridSize

  // -------------------
  // POINTS
  // -------------------
  const points = []

  // définir density selon le choix
  let density = null
  if (choix_repartition_points === "Ondulations croisées régulières") {
    density = (x, y) => Math.abs(Math.sin(x * 0.5) * Math.cos(y * 0.5) + Math.sin(x * 0.2 + y * 0.3))
  } else if (choix_repartition_points === "Ondulations croisées irrégulières") {
    density = (x, y) => Math.cos(x * 0.3) * Math.sin(y * 0.7) + Math.cos(x * 0.1 + y * 0.2)
  } else if (choix_repartition_points === "Ondulations sinusoïdales") {
    density = (x, y) => Math.abs(Math.sin(x * 0.5) * Math.cos(y * 0.5) + Math.sin(x * 0.2 + y * 0.3))
  } else if (choix_repartition_points === "Concentration centrale") {
    density = (x, y) => {
      const cx = gridSize / 2
      const cy = gridSize / 2
      const sigma = gridSize / 5
      // densité plus élevée vers le centre
      return Math.exp(-((x - cx) ** 2 + (y - cy) ** 2) / (2 * sigma ** 2))
    }
  } else if (choix_repartition_points === "Motif en cercles concentriques ou anneaux") {
    density = (x, y) => {
      const cx = gridSize / 2
      const cy = gridSize / 2
      const r = Math.sqrt((x - cx) ** 2 + (y - cy) ** 2)
      // anneaux concentriques avec densité variable
      return 0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(r * 0.5)
    }
  }

  // si choix uniforme, on ignore density et on fait simple
  if (choix_repartition_points === "Uniforme") {
    for (let i = 0; i < numPoints; i++) {
      points.push({
        x: Math.random() * gridSize,
        y: Math.random() * gridSize
      })
    }
  } else {
    // boucle commune pour B ou C (ou d'autres) utilisant density
    while (points.length < numPoints) {
      const x = Math.random() * gridSize
      const y = Math.random() * gridSize

      const d = density(x, y)

      if (Math.random() < d / 2) {
        points.push({ x, y })
      }
    }
  }


  // -------------------
  // CASES SÉLECTIONNÉES
  // -------------------
  const selectedCells = new Set()

  while (selectedCells.size < k) {
    const x = Math.floor(Math.random() * gridSize)
    const y = Math.floor(Math.random() * gridSize)
    selectedCells.add(`${x},${y}`)
  }

  // -------------------
  // TEST
  // -------------------
  function isSelected(p) {
    const x = Math.floor(p.x)
    const y = Math.floor(p.y)
    return selectedCells.has(`${x},${y}`)
  }

  // -------------------
  // COMPTER
  // -------------------
  const captured = points.filter(isSelected).length

  // -------------------
  // ESTIMATION
  // -------------------
  const estimatedTotal = (captured / k) * totalCells

  // erreur
  const error = Math.abs(estimatedTotal - numPoints)

  // -------------------
  // SVG
  // -------------------
  const svgNS = "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
  const svg = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "svg")

  svg.setAttribute("viewBox", `0 0 ${gridSize} ${gridSize}`)
  svg.setAttribute("width", 500)
  svg.setAttribute("height", 500)
  svg.style.border = "1px solid black"

  // grille
  for (let i = 0; i <= gridSize; i++) {
    const h = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "line")
    h.setAttribute("x1", 0)
    h.setAttribute("y1", i)
    h.setAttribute("x2", gridSize)
    h.setAttribute("y2", i)
    h.setAttribute("stroke", "#888")
    h.setAttribute("stroke-width", 0.02)
    svg.appendChild(h)

    const v = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "line")
    v.setAttribute("x1", i)
    v.setAttribute("y1", 0)
    v.setAttribute("x2", i)
    v.setAttribute("y2", gridSize)
    v.setAttribute("stroke", "#888")
    v.setAttribute("stroke-width", 0.02)
    svg.appendChild(v)
  }

  // cases
  for (const cell of selectedCells) {
    const [x, y] = cell.split(",").map(Number)

    const rect = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "rect")
    rect.setAttribute("x", x)
    rect.setAttribute("y", y)
    rect.setAttribute("width", 1)
    rect.setAttribute("height", 1)
    rect.setAttribute("fill", "blue")
    rect.setAttribute("opacity", 0.5)

    svg.appendChild(rect)
  }

  // points
  for (const p of points) {
    const c = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "circle")
    c.setAttribute("cx", p.x)
    c.setAttribute("cy", p.y)
    c.setAttribute("r", 0.1)
    c.setAttribute("fill", isSelected(p) ? "red" : "black")
    svg.appendChild(c)
  }

  // -------------------
  // UI
  // -------------------
  // Container principal : disposition horizontale
  const container = document.createElement("div")
  container.style.display = "flex"
  container.style.flexDirection = "row"
  container.style.gap = "20px"
  container.style.fontFamily = "sans-serif"
  container.style.fontSize = "12px"
  container.style.lineHeight = "1.4"
  
  // Colonne gauche : texte
  const textCol = document.createElement("div")
  textCol.style.flex = "1"           
  textCol.style.minWidth = "200px"   
  textCol.style.display = "flex"
  textCol.style.flexDirection = "column"
  textCol.style.gap = "10px"
  
  // Texte indicateurs
  const text = document.createElement("div")
  text.style.fontSize = "12px"       
  text.style.margin = "10px 0"
  
  const errorPercent = Math.abs(estimatedTotal - numPoints) / numPoints * 100
  
  text.innerHTML = `
    <br><br>
    <b>Points capturés :</b> ${captured} / ${numPoints}<br>
    <b>Estimation population :</b> ${Math.round(estimatedTotal)}<br>
    <b>Vraie population :</b> ${numPoints}<br>
    <b>Erreur :</b> ${errorPercent.toFixed(2)} %
  `
  
  textCol.appendChild(text)
  
  // Colonne droite : la grille (SVG)
  const svgCol = document.createElement("div")
  svgCol.style.flexShrink = "0"      // empêche le SVG de rétrécir
  svgCol.appendChild(svg)
  
  // Ajout des colonnes au container
  container.appendChild(textCol)
  container.appendChild(svgCol)
  
  return container
}
```
  </div>
</div>


<!-- /////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// -->
<!-- //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////  -->


## <span style="font-size:36px;">Simulation de tirages personnalisés</span>

<div style="display:flex; gap:40px; align-items:flex-start; font-family:sans-serif;">
  <div>

  <!-- Colonne gauche : sliders -->
<span style="font-size:18px;font-weight:bold">Paramètres :</span><br>
<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Taille de la grille :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof gridSize2 = (() => {
  const slider = Inputs.range([5, 100], {value: 20, step: 1})
  slider.style.width = "250px"
  slider.style.fontSize = "20px"
  return slider
})()
```

<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Nombre de points :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof numPoints2 = (() => {
  const slider = Inputs.range([10, 5000], {value: 500, step: 10})
  slider.style.width = "250px"
  slider.style.fontSize = "20px"
  return slider
})()
```

<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Nombre de cases sélectionnées :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof k2 = (() => {
  const slider = Inputs.range([1, gridSize2 * gridSize2], {value: 60, step: 1})
  slider.style.width = "250px"
  slider.style.fontSize = "20px"
  return slider
})()
```

-------------------------

<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Choix de la répartition des points :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof choix_repartition_points2 = Inputs.select(
  [
    "Uniforme",
    "Ondulations croisées régulières",
    "Ondulations croisées irrégulières",
    "Ondulations sinusoïdales",
    "Concentration centrale",
    "Motif en cercles concentriques ou anneaux"
  ],
  { value: "Uniforme"}
)
```

<style>
  select, select option {
    font-size: 20px !important;   /* taille des options */
  }
</style>

  </div>

  <!-- Colonne droite : grille -->
  <div id="grid-container">

```{ojs}
mutable selectedCells = new Set()
```

```{ojs}
mutable points = (function() {
  const points = []

  // définir density selon le choix
  let density = null
  if (choix_repartition_points2 === "Ondulations croisées régulières") {
    density = (x, y) => Math.abs(Math.sin(x * 0.5) * Math.cos(y * 0.5) + Math.sin(x * 0.2 + y * 0.3))
  } else if (choix_repartition_points2 === "Ondulations croisées irrégulières") {
    density = (x, y) => Math.cos(x * 0.3) * Math.sin(y * 0.7) + Math.cos(x * 0.1 + y * 0.2)
  } else if (choix_repartition_points2 === "Ondulations sinusoïdales") {
    density = (x, y) => Math.abs(Math.sin(x * 0.5) * Math.cos(y * 0.5) + Math.sin(x * 0.2 + y * 0.3))
  } else if (choix_repartition_points2 === "Concentration centrale") {
    density = (x, y) => {
      const cx = gridSize2 / 2
      const cy = gridSize2 / 2
      const sigma = gridSize2 / 5
      // densité plus élevée vers le centre
      return Math.exp(-((x - cx) ** 2 + (y - cy) ** 2) / (2 * sigma ** 2))
    }
  } else if (choix_repartition_points2 === "Motif en cercles concentriques ou anneaux") {
    density = (x, y) => {
      const cx = gridSize2 / 2
      const cy = gridSize2 / 2
      const r = Math.sqrt((x - cx) ** 2 + (y - cy) ** 2)
      // anneaux concentriques avec densité variable
      return 0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(r * 0.5)
    }
  }

  // si choix uniforme, on ignore density et on fait simple
  if (choix_repartition_points2 === "Uniforme") {
    for (let i = 0; i < numPoints2; i++) {
      points.push({
        x: Math.random() * gridSize2,
        y: Math.random() * gridSize2
      })
    }
  } else {
    // boucle commune pour B ou C (ou d'autres) utilisant density
    while (points.length < numPoints2) {
      const x = Math.random() * gridSize2
      const y = Math.random() * gridSize2

      const d = density(x, y)

      if (Math.random() < d / 2) {
        points.push({ x, y })
      }
    }
  }
  return points
})()
```

```{ojs}
{
  const svgNS = "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
  const svg = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "svg")
  svg.setAttribute("viewBox", `0 0 ${gridSize2} ${gridSize2}`)
  svg.setAttribute("width", 500)
  svg.setAttribute("height", 500)
  svg.style.border = "1px solid black"
  svg.style.cursor = "crosshair"

  let dragging =false
  let addMode = true

  function processCell(x, y) {
    const key = `${x},${y}`
    const next = new Set(mutable selectedCells)
    if (next.has(key)) {
      if (!addMode) next.delete(key)
    } else {
      if (addMode) {
        if (next.size >= k2) {
          const first = next.values().next().value
          next.delete(first)
        }
        next.add(key)
      }
    }
    mutable selectedCells = next
    updateDisplay()
  }

  function getMouseCell(e) {
    const rect = svg.getBoundingClientRect()
    const x = Math.floor((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width * gridSize2)
    const y = Math.floor((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height * gridSize2)
    return [x, y]
  }

  svg.addEventListener("mousedown", e => {
    dragging = true
    const [x, y] = getMouseCell(e)
    addMode = !mutable selectedCells.has(`${x},${y}`)
    processCell(x, y)
  })

  svg.addEventListener("mousemove", e => {
    if (!dragging) return
    const [x, y] = getMouseCell(e)
    processCell(x, y)
  })

  svg.addEventListener("mouseup", () => { dragging = false })
  svg.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => { dragging = false })

  // Grille + cases + points
  const gridLines = []
  const caseRects = []
  const pointCircles = []

  for (let i = 0; i <= gridSize2; i++) {
    const h = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "line")
    h.setAttribute("x1", 0); h.setAttribute("y1", i)
    h.setAttribute("x2", gridSize2); h.setAttribute("y2", i)
    h.setAttribute("stroke", "#555"); h.setAttribute("stroke-width", 0.05)
    svg.appendChild(h)
    gridLines.push(h)

    const v = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "line")
    v.setAttribute("x1", i); v.setAttribute("y1", 0)
    v.setAttribute("x2", i); v.setAttribute("y2", gridSize2)
    v.setAttribute("stroke", "#555"); v.setAttribute("stroke-width", 0.05)
    svg.appendChild(v)
    gridLines.push(v)
  }

  for (const p of mutable points) {
    const c = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "circle")
    c.setAttribute("cx", p.x); c.setAttribute("cy", p.y)
    c.setAttribute("r", 0.1)
    c.setAttribute("fill", "black")
    svg.appendChild(c)
    pointCircles.push(c)
  }

  function updateDisplay() {
    // Cases
    caseRects.forEach(r => svg.removeChild(r))
    caseRects.length = 0
    for (const cell of mutable selectedCells) {
      const [x, y] = cell.split(",").map(Number)
      const rect = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "rect")
      rect.setAttribute("x", x); rect.setAttribute("y", y)
      rect.setAttribute("width", 1); rect.setAttribute("height", 1)
      rect.setAttribute("fill", "blue"); rect.setAttribute("opacity", 0.5)
      svg.appendChild(rect)
      caseRects.push(rect)
    }

    // Points color
    for (let i = 0; i < mutable points.length; i++) {
      const p = mutable points[i]
      pointCircles[i].setAttribute(
        "fill",
        mutable selectedCells.has(`${Math.floor(p.x)},${Math.floor(p.y)}`) ? "red" : "black"
      )
    }

    // Stats
    const captured = mutable points.filter(p => mutable selectedCells.has(`${Math.floor(p.x)},${Math.floor(p.y)}`)).length
    const estimatedTotal = (captured / Math.max(1, mutable selectedCells.size)) * (gridSize2*gridSize2)
    const errorPercent = Math.abs(estimatedTotal - numPoints2) / numPoints2 * 100
    estimatedDiv.innerHTML = `
      <br><br>
      <b>Cases sélectionnées :</b> ${mutable selectedCells.size} / ${k2}<br>
      <b>Points capturés :</b> ${captured} / ${numPoints2}<br>
      <b>Estimation :</b> ${Math.round((captured / Math.max(1, mutable selectedCells.size)) * (gridSize2*gridSize2))}<br>
      <b>Vraie population :</b> ${numPoints2}<br>
      <b>Erreur :</b> ${errorPercent.toFixed(2)} %
    `
  }

  // Colonne gauche : texte + bouton
  const leftCol = document.createElement("div")
  leftCol.style.display = "flex"
  leftCol.style.flexDirection = "column"
  leftCol.style.gap = "10px"
  leftCol.style.alignItems = "flex-start"
  leftCol.style.flex = "1"        
  leftCol.style.minWidth = "200px" 
  
  const container = document.createElement("div")
  container.style.display = "flex"   // layout horizontal
  container.style.flexDirection = "row"
  container.style.gap = "20px"
  container.style.fontFamily = "sans-serif"
  container.style.fontSize = "12px"
  container.style.lineHeight = "1.4"
  
  // Div pour les indicateurs
  const estimatedDiv = document.createElement("div")
  estimatedDiv.style.margin = "10px 0"
  
  const resetBtn = document.createElement("button")
  resetBtn.textContent = "Reset"
  resetBtn.onclick = () => {
    mutable selectedCells = new Set()
    updateDisplay()
  }
  
  // Ajout des éléments à la colonne gauche
  leftCol.appendChild(estimatedDiv)
  leftCol.appendChild(resetBtn)
  
  // Colonne droite : la grille (SVG)
  const rightCol = document.createElement("div")
  rightCol.style.flexShrink = "0"   // empêche la grille de rétrécir
  rightCol.appendChild(svg)
  
  // Ajout des deux colonnes au container
  container.appendChild(leftCol)
  container.appendChild(rightCol)
  
  updateDisplay() // affichage initial
  
  return container
}
```

  </div>
</div>


<!-- /////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// -->
<!-- //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////  -->


## <span style="font-size:36px;">Simulation de tirages aléatoires à plusieurs classes</span>

<div style="display:flex; gap:40px; align-items:flex-start; font-family:sans-serif;">
  <div>

  <!-- Colonne gauche : sliders -->
<span style="font-size:18px;font-weight:bold">Paramètres :</span><br>
<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Taille de la grille :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof gridSize3 = (() => {
  const slider = Inputs.range([5, 100], {value: 20, step: 1})
  slider.style.width = "250px"
  slider.style.fontSize = "20px"
  return slider
})()
```

<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Nombre de points :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof numPoints3 = (() => {
  const slider = Inputs.range([10, 5000], {value: 500, step: 10})
  slider.style.width = "250px"
  slider.style.fontSize = "20px"
  return slider
})()
```

<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Nombre de cases sélectionnées :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof k3 = (() => {
  const slider = Inputs.range([1, gridSize3 * gridSize3], {value: 60, step: 1})
  slider.style.width = "250px"
  slider.style.fontSize = "20px"
  return slider
})()
```

-------------------

<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Choix de la répartition des points :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof choix_repartition_points3 = Inputs.select(
  [
    "Uniforme",
    "Ondulations croisées régulières",
    "Ondulations croisées irrégulières",
    "Ondulations sinusoïdales",
    "Concentration centrale",
    "Motif en cercles concentriques ou anneaux"
  ],
  { value: "Uniforme"}
)
```

<style>
  select, select option {
    font-size: 20px !important;   /* taille des options */
  }
</style>
  </div>

  <!-- Colonne droite : grille -->
  <div id="grid-container">
```{ojs}
{
  const totalCells = gridSize3 * gridSize3

  // -------------------
  // PARAMETRES COULEURS
  // -------------------
  const colors = ["red", "green", "orange"]
  const names = ["Rouge", "Vert", "Orange"]

  // -------------------
  // POINTS
  // -------------------
  const points = []

  let density = null
  if (choix_repartition_points3 === "Ondulations croisées régulières") {
    density = (x, y) => Math.abs(Math.sin(x * 0.5) * Math.cos(y * 0.5) + Math.sin(x * 0.2 + y * 0.3))
  } else if (choix_repartition_points3 === "Ondulations croisées irrégulières") {
    density = (x, y) => Math.cos(x * 0.3) * Math.sin(y * 0.7) + Math.cos(x * 0.1 + y * 0.2)
  } else if (choix_repartition_points3 === "Ondulations sinusoïdales") {
    density = (x, y) => Math.abs(Math.sin(x * 0.5) * Math.cos(y * 0.5) + Math.sin(x * 0.2 + y * 0.3))
  } else if (choix_repartition_points3 === "Concentration centrale") {
    density = (x, y) => {
      const cx = gridSize3 / 2
      const cy = gridSize3 / 2
      const sigma = gridSize3 / 5
      return Math.exp(-((x - cx) ** 2 + (y - cy) ** 2) / (2 * sigma ** 2))
    }
  } else if (choix_repartition_points3 === "Anneaux") {
    density = (x, y) => {
      const cx = gridSize3 / 2
      const cy = gridSize3 / 2
      const r = Math.sqrt((x - cx) ** 2 + (y - cy) ** 2)
      return 0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(r * 0.5)
    }
  }

  function randomType() {
    return Math.floor(Math.random() * 3)
  }

  if (choix_repartition_points3 === "Uniforme") {
    for (let i = 0; i < numPoints3; i++) {
      points.push({
        x: Math.random() * gridSize3,
        y: Math.random() * gridSize3,
        type: randomType()
      })
    }
  } else {
    while (points.length < numPoints3) {
      const x = Math.random() * gridSize3
      const y = Math.random() * gridSize3
      if (Math.random() < density(x, y) / 2) {
        points.push({ x, y, type: randomType() })
      }
    }
  }

  // -------------------
  // CASES
  // -------------------
  const selectedCells = new Set()
  while (selectedCells.size < k3) {
    const x = Math.floor(Math.random() * gridSize3)
    const y = Math.floor(Math.random() * gridSize3)
    selectedCells.add(`${x},${y}`)
  }

  function isSelected(p) {
    return selectedCells.has(`${Math.floor(p.x)},${Math.floor(p.y)}`)
  }

  // -------------------
  // COMPTAGE
  // -------------------
  const counts = [0, 0, 0]
  const capturedCounts = [0, 0, 0]

  for (const p of points) {
    counts[p.type]++
    if (isSelected(p)) capturedCounts[p.type]++
  }

  // estimations
  const estimatedCounts = capturedCounts.map(c => (c / k3) * totalCells)

  // erreurs
  const errors = estimatedCounts.map((est, i) => Math.abs(est - counts[i]))
  const errorPercents = errors.map((e, i) => (counts[i] > 0 ? (e / counts[i]) * 100 : 0))

  // -------------------
  // SVG
  // -------------------
  const svgNS = "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
  const svg = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "svg")

  svg.setAttribute("viewBox", `0 0 ${gridSize3} ${gridSize3}`)
  svg.setAttribute("width", 500)
  svg.setAttribute("height", 500)
  svg.style.border = "1px solid black"

  // grille
  for (let i = 0; i <= gridSize3; i++) {
    const h = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "line")
    h.setAttribute("x1", 0)
    h.setAttribute("y1", i)
    h.setAttribute("x2", gridSize3)
    h.setAttribute("y2", i)
    h.setAttribute("stroke", "#888")
    h.setAttribute("stroke-width", 0.02)
    svg.appendChild(h)

    const v = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "line")
    v.setAttribute("x1", i)
    v.setAttribute("y1", 0)
    v.setAttribute("x2", i)
    v.setAttribute("y2", gridSize3)
    v.setAttribute("stroke", "#888")
    v.setAttribute("stroke-width", 0.02)
    svg.appendChild(v)
  }

  // cases
  for (const cell of selectedCells) {
    const [x, y] = cell.split(",").map(Number)
    const rect = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "rect")
    rect.setAttribute("x", x)
    rect.setAttribute("y", y)
    rect.setAttribute("width", 1)
    rect.setAttribute("height", 1)
    rect.setAttribute("fill", "blue")
    rect.setAttribute("opacity", 0.2)
    svg.appendChild(rect)
  }

  // points TOUS colorés
  for (const p of points) {
    const c = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "circle")
    c.setAttribute("cx", p.x)
    c.setAttribute("cy", p.y)
    c.setAttribute("r", 0.1)
    c.setAttribute("fill", colors[p.type])
    svg.appendChild(c)
  }

  // -------------------
  // TEXTE
  // -------------------
  const text = document.createElement("div")
  text.style.fontSize = "12px"
  text.style.margin = "10px 0"

  let html = `<br><br><br><br><b>Population totale :</b> ${numPoints3}<br><br>`

  for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
    html += `
      <b style="color:${colors[i]}">${names[i]}</b><br>
      Total réel : ${counts[i]}<br>
      Capturés : ${capturedCounts[i]}<br>
      Proportion capturée : ${(capturedCounts[i] / Math.max(1, k3)).toFixed(3)}<br>
      Estimation : ${Math.round(estimatedCounts[i])}<br>
      Erreur relative : ${errorPercents[i].toFixed(2)} %<br><br>
    `
  }
  
  const container = document.createElement("div")
  container.style.display = "flex"
  container.style.flexDirection = "row"
  container.style.alignItems = "flex-start"
  container.style.gap = "12px"
  
  // colonne gauche (texte)
  const leftCol = document.createElement("div")
  leftCol.style.display = "flex"
  leftCol.style.flexDirection = "column"
  leftCol.style.flex = "1"       
  leftCol.style.maxWidth = "none" 
  leftCol.style.minWidth = "200px"
  
  text.innerHTML = html
  leftCol.appendChild(text)
  
  // colonne droite (grille)
  const rightCol = document.createElement("div")
  rightCol.style.flexShrink = "0"
  rightCol.style.width = "520px" // ou 500 selon ton svg
  rightCol.appendChild(svg)
  
  // assemblage
  container.appendChild(leftCol)
  container.appendChild(rightCol)
  
  return container
}
```
  </div>
</div>


<!-- /////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// -->
<!-- //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////  -->


## <span style="font-size:36px;">Simulation de tirages personnalisés à plusieurs classes</span> 

<div style="display:flex; gap:50px; align-items:flex-start; font-family:sans-serif;">
  <div>
  <!-- Colonne gauche : sliders -->
<span style="font-size:18px;font-weight:bold">Paramètres :</span><br>
<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Taille de la grille :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof gridSize4 = (() => {
  const slider = Inputs.range([5, 100], {value: 20, step: 1})
  slider.style.width = "250px"    
  slider.style.fontSize = "20px"  
  return slider
})()
```

<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Nombre de points :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof numPoints4 = (() => {
  const slider = Inputs.range([10, 5000], {value: 500, step: 10}) 
  slider.style.width = "250px"    
  slider.style.fontSize = "20px"  
  return slider
})()
```

<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Nombre de cases sélectionnées :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof k4 = (() => {
  const slider = Inputs.range([1, gridSize4 * gridSize4], {value: 60, step: 1})
  slider.style.width = "250px"    
  slider.style.fontSize = "20px" 
  return slider
})()
```
-------------------------------------------------------------------------
<span style="font-size:18px;font-style:italic">Choix de la répartition des points :</span>
```{ojs}
viewof choix_repartition_points4 = Inputs.select(
  [
    "Uniforme",
    "Ondulations croisées régulières",
    "Ondulations croisées irrégulières",
    "Ondulations sinusoïdales",
    "Concentration centrale",
    "Motif en cercles concentriques ou anneaux"
  ],
  { value: "Uniforme"}
)
```

<style>
  select, select option {
    font-size: 20px !important;   /* taille des options */
  }
</style>

  </div>
  
  <!-- Colonne droite : grille -->
  <div id="grid-container">
  
```{ojs}
mutable selectedCells2 = new Set()
```
  
```{ojs}
mutable points2 = (function() {
  const points2 = []

  function randomType() {
    return Math.floor(Math.random() * 3)
  }

  let density = null
  if (choix_repartition_points4 === "Ondulations croisées régulières") {
    density = (x, y) => Math.abs(Math.sin(x * 0.5) * Math.cos(y * 0.5) + Math.sin(x * 0.2 + y * 0.3))
  } else if (choix_repartition_points4 === "Ondulations croisées irrégulières") {
    density = (x, y) => Math.cos(x * 0.3) * Math.sin(y * 0.7) + Math.cos(x * 0.1 + y * 0.2)
  } else if (choix_repartition_points4 === "Concentration centrale") {
    density = (x, y) => {
      const cx = gridSize4 / 2
      const cy = gridSize4 / 2
      const sigma = gridSize4 / 5
      return Math.exp(-((x - cx) ** 2 + (y - cy) ** 2) / (2 * sigma ** 2))
    }
  } else if (choix_repartition_points4 === "Motif en cercles concentriques ou anneaux") {
    density = (x, y) => {
      const cx = gridSize4 / 2
      const cy = gridSize4 / 2
      const r = Math.sqrt((x - cx) ** 2 + (y - cy) ** 2)
      return 0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(r * 0.5)
    }
  }

  if (choix_repartition_points4 === "Uniforme") {
    for (let i = 0; i < numPoints4; i++) {
      points2.push({
        x: Math.random() * gridSize4,
        y: Math.random() * gridSize4,
        type: randomType()
      })
    }
  } else {
    while (points2.length < numPoints4) {
      const x = Math.random() * gridSize4
      const y = Math.random() * gridSize4
      if (Math.random() < density(x, y) / 2) {
        points2.push({ x, y, type: randomType() })
      }
    }
  }

  return points2
})()
```
  
```{ojs}
{
  const svgNS = "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
  const colors = ["red", "green", "orange"]

  const svg = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "svg")
  svg.setAttribute("viewBox", `0 0 ${gridSize4} ${gridSize4}`)
  svg.setAttribute("width", 500)
  svg.setAttribute("height", 500)
  svg.style.border = "1px solid black"
  svg.style.cursor = "crosshair"

  let dragging = false
  let addMode = true

  function processCell(x, y) {
    const key = `${x},${y}`
    const next = new Set(mutable selectedCells2)

    if (next.has(key)) {
      if (!addMode) next.delete(key)
    } else {
      if (addMode) {
        if (next.size >= k4) {
          const first = next.values().next().value
          next.delete(first)
        }
        next.add(key)
      }
    }

    mutable selectedCells2 = next
    updateDisplay()
  }

  function getMouseCell(e) {
    const rect = svg.getBoundingClientRect()
    const x = Math.floor((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width * gridSize4)
    const y = Math.floor((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height * gridSize4)
    return [x, y]
  }

  svg.addEventListener("mousedown", e => {
    dragging = true
    const [x, y] = getMouseCell(e)
    addMode = !mutable selectedCells2.has(`${x},${y}`)
    processCell(x, y)
  })

  svg.addEventListener("mousemove", e => {
    if (!dragging) return
    const [x, y] = getMouseCell(e)
    processCell(x, y)
  })

  svg.addEventListener("mouseup", () => dragging = false)
  svg.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => dragging = false)

  // grille
  for (let i = 0; i <= gridSize4; i++) {
    const h = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "line")
    h.setAttribute("x1", 0)
    h.setAttribute("y1", i)
    h.setAttribute("x2", gridSize4)
    h.setAttribute("y2", i)
    h.setAttribute("stroke", "#555")
    h.setAttribute("stroke-width", 0.05)
    svg.appendChild(h)

    const v = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "line")
    v.setAttribute("x1", i)
    v.setAttribute("y1", 0)
    v.setAttribute("x2", i)
    v.setAttribute("y2", gridSize4)
    v.setAttribute("stroke", "#555")
    v.setAttribute("stroke-width", 0.05)
    svg.appendChild(v)
  }

  const caseRects = []
  const pointCircles = []

  // points (toujours colorés)
  for (const p of mutable points2) {
    const c = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "circle")
    c.setAttribute("cx", p.x)
    c.setAttribute("cy", p.y)
    c.setAttribute("r", 0.1)
    c.setAttribute("fill", colors[p.type])
    svg.appendChild(c)
    pointCircles.push(c)
  }

  function updateDisplay() {
    // cases
    caseRects.forEach(r => svg.removeChild(r))
    caseRects.length = 0

    for (const cell of mutable selectedCells2) {
      const [x, y] = cell.split(",").map(Number)
      const rect = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "rect")
      rect.setAttribute("x", x)
      rect.setAttribute("y", y)
      rect.setAttribute("width", 1)
      rect.setAttribute("height", 1)
      rect.setAttribute("fill", "blue")
      rect.setAttribute("opacity", 0.3)
      svg.appendChild(rect)
      caseRects.push(rect)
    }

    // stats
    const counts = [0, 0, 0]
    const capturedCounts = [0, 0, 0]

    for (const p of mutable points2) {
      counts[p.type]++
      if (mutable selectedCells2.has(`${Math.floor(p.x)},${Math.floor(p.y)}`)) {
        capturedCounts[p.type]++
      }
    }

    const totalCells = gridSize4 * gridSize4

    const estimated = capturedCounts.map(c =>
      (c / Math.max(1, mutable selectedCells2.size)) * totalCells
    )

    const errors = estimated.map((e, i) => Math.abs(e - counts[i]))
    const errorPercents = errors.map((e, i) =>
      counts[i] > 0 ? (e / counts[i]) * 100 : 0
    )

    const names = ["Rouge", "Vert", "Orange"]

    let html = `<br><br><br><br><b>Cases sélectionnées :</b> ${mutable selectedCells2.size} / ${k4}<br><br>
                <b>Population totale :</b> ${numPoints4}<br><br>`
    
    for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
      html += `
        <b style="color:${colors[i]}">${names[i]}</b><br>
        Total réel : ${counts[i]}<br>
        Capturés : ${capturedCounts[i]}<br>
        Proportion capturée : ${(capturedCounts[i] / Math.max(1, mutable selectedCells2.size)).toFixed(3)}<br>
        Estimation : ${Math.round(estimated[i])}<br>
        Erreur relative : ${errorPercents[i].toFixed(2)} %<br><br>
      `
    }

    estimatedDiv.innerHTML = html
  }

  // layout
  const container = document.createElement("div")
  container.style.display = "flex"
  container.style.flexDirection = "row"
  container.style.gap = "20px"
  container.style.fontFamily = "sans-serif"
  container.style.fontSize = "12px"
  container.style.alignItems = "flex-start"

  const leftCol = document.createElement("div")
  leftCol.style.flex = "2"
  leftCol.style.minWidth = "200px"

  const estimatedDiv = document.createElement("div")

  const resetBtn = document.createElement("button")
  resetBtn.textContent = "Reset"
  resetBtn.onclick = () => {
    mutable selectedCells2 = new Set()
    updateDisplay()
  }

  leftCol.appendChild(estimatedDiv)
  leftCol.appendChild(resetBtn)

  container.appendChild(leftCol)
  container.appendChild(svg)

  updateDisplay()

  return container
}
```

  </div>
</div>
